Settlement Rules (from docs/SETTLEMENT_RULES.md): - All members must deposit before group activates - Deposits are locked until group closes - Expenses settle via balance updates when all accept - Withdrawal only after unanimous close vote Security (from docs/SECURITY_BASELINE.md): - ReentrancyGuard on withdrawals - SafeERC20 for all token transfers - Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern - Pull payment pattern only","errors":{"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC-20 token failed."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"acceptExpense(uint256)":{"details":"Payer cannot accept their own expense. acceptExpense(uint256).details: Payer cannot accept their own expense.      Participant must have sufficient balance.      Auto-settles when all required acceptances received.

cancelExpense(uint256).details: Only payer can cancel. Only before settlement.

cancelGroup().details: Can be called by any member while group is Pending.      Triggers refunds for all depositors.

checkDeadline().details: Can be called by anyone. Useful for cleanup.

params._depositDeadline: Unix timestamp after which group is cancelled
params._members: Array of member addresses (must include creator)
params._token: ERC20 token for deposits and settlements

createExpense(uint256,address[],uint256[.details: Only callable when group is Active.      All participants must be deposited members.      Payer (msg.sender) can be included in participants.

params.participants: Array of addresses who share the cost
params.shares: Array of share amounts (must sum to amount)

returns.expenseId: The ID of the created expense

deposit().details: Auto-activates group when all members have deposited.      Uses SafeERC20 and checks actual received amount for      fee-on-transfer token compatibility.

proposeClose().details: Any deposited member can propose.      Proposer's vote is automatically counted.

refundDeposit().details: Pull payment pattern - depositor must claim their refund.

withdraw().details: Pull payment pattern. Only after Closed state.      ReentrancyGuard protects against reentrancy.

checkDeadline().notice: Check and cancel group if deadline has passed.

deposit().notice: Deposit required amount to join the group.

withdraw().notice: Withdraw final balance after group closes.
